assertions.title: Candlestick chart renders with correct OHLC data

steps.expected: Chart tab active by default with candlestick chart
steps.observed: Chart tab active, candlestick chart rendered
Teal (#26a69a) bullish and red (#ef5350) bearish candles visible
Price axis shows ~1.09-1.10 (EURUSD)
288 candles on 5m default TF

assertions.title: Multi-config overlay distinct color sets per config

steps.observed: Only 1 config ('current_locked') in fixture data
CONFIG_COLORS defined with teal (Config A), amber (Config B), purple (Config C)
Single config toggle with teal swatch

assertions.issues: Fixture data (evaluation_run.json) contains only 1 config ('current_locked'), not 2. Cannot visually verify distinct color sets for multiple configs. Task description says '2 configs' but actual data has 1. Code supports multi-config via CONFIG_COLORS array. renderConfigLegend function exists but is not called in initChartTab; config toggle buttons serve as the legend.

assertions.title: Config toggle show/hide individual config markers

steps.observed: Button 'current_locked' visible with color swatch
All detection markers removed from chart, only candles and session bands remain
Detection markers restored on chart

assertions.issues: Only 1 config in fixture, so 'both hidden simultaneously' scenario is equivalent to hiding the single config. With 1 config, toggling off shows only candles.

assertions.title: Primitive layer toggle show/hide FVG markers

steps.observed: Button 'Fvg' visible in Primitives section

steps.expected: FVG markers hidden, other primitives unaffected
steps.observed: FVG markers removed; primitiveToggles.fvg = false confirmed via eval
FVG markers restored; primitiveToggles.fvg = true

assertions.title: Primitive layer toggle show/hide displacement markers

steps.observed: Button 'Displacement' visible
Displacement markers removed; primitiveToggles.displacement = false confirmed
Displacement markers restored

assertions.title: Primitive layer toggle show/hide MSS markers

steps.observed: Button 'Mss' visible
MSS markers removed; primitiveToggles.mss = false confirmed
MSS markers restored

assertions.title: Primitive layer toggle show/hide OB markers

steps.observed: Button 'Order Block' visible
OB markers removed; primitiveToggles.order_block = false confirmed
OB markers restored

assertions.title: Primitive layer toggle show/hide sweep markers

steps.observed: Button 'Liquidity Sweep' visible
Sweep markers removed; primitiveToggles.liquidity_sweep = false confirmed
Sweep markers restored

assertions.title: TF switching 1m candles and detections

steps.observed: 1433 candles loaded (vs 288 for 5m = 4.97x). '1m' button shows active state.
Detection markers visible on 1m chart. Count summary updated to 1388 total.

assertions.title: TF switching 5m candles and detections (default)

steps.observed: app.tf === '5m' confirmed; '5m' button has active styling
288 candles for 5m TF on Tue Jan 9
Displacement: 160, Fvg: 71, Mss: 13, OB: 10, LS: 7, Total: 261

assertions.title: TF switching 15m candles and detections

steps.observed: 96 candles (vs 288 for 5m = 0.33x). '15m' button shows active state.
Detection markers visible. Count summary: Displacement 58, Fvg 24, Mss 8, OB 8, LS 9, Total 107.

screenshots: chart-15m.png (not captured separately, verified via eval)

assertions.title: Day navigation 5 day tabs visible

steps.expected: 5 tabs: Mon Jan 8 through Fri Jan 12
steps.observed: 5 buttons visible: 'Mon Jan 8', 'Tue Jan 9', 'Wed Jan 10', 'Thu Jan 11', 'Fri Jan 12'
Tue Jan 9 active (app.day === '2024-01-09')

assertions.title: Day navigation clicking tab switches chart data

steps.expected: Chart loads Mon Jan 8 data with different price levels
steps.observed: Chart updated to Jan 8 data. Different price pattern visible. Mon Jan 8 tab highlighted as active.
Total changed from 261 (Tue Jan 9) to 283 (Mon Jan 8)
Chart restored to Jan 9 data with original counts

assertions.title: Session boundary bands visible

steps.action: Verify session bands render behind candles
steps.expected: Colored vertical bands for Asia, LOKZ, NYOKZ
steps.observed: 5 session bands visible for Tue Jan 9: Asia (19:00-00:00), LOKZ (02:00-05:00), NYOKZ (07:00-10:00), NY-A (08:00-09:00), NY-B (10:00-11:00). Bands rendered at zOrder 'bottom' behind candles.
Each session uses distinct semi-transparent fill color with dashed borders

assertions.title: Session boundary colors match design system with legend

steps.expected: Legend labels each session with name and time range
steps.observed: Session legend visible in controls bar showing: 'Asia 19:00–00:00' (purple), 'LOKZ 02:00–05:00' (blue), 'NYOKZ 07:00–10:00' (teal)

steps.expected: Colors from SESSION_META match design system
steps.observed: Asia: rgba(156,39,176,0.5) purple, LOKZ: rgba(41,98,255,0.5) blue, NYOKZ: rgba(38,166,154,0.5) teal — all match design tokens

assertions.title: Detection count summary updates per config per primitive

steps.observed: Detection summary table shows: Displacement 160, Fvg 71, Mss 13, OB 10, LS 7, Total 261 for 'current_locked' on 5m/Tue Jan 9
On 15m: Displacement 58, Fvg 24, Mss 8, OB 8, LS 9, Total 107 — counts correctly updated
Mon Jan 8: Total 283, different primitive distribution — counts correctly updated

assertions.title: Chart is scrollable (pan left/right)

steps.observed: Chart options confirm handleScroll.pressedMouseMove: true, mouseWheel: true, horzTouchDrag: true
scrollToPosition(-50) shifted visible logical range from [76.18, 337] to [27.51, 288.33] — chart panned ~49 bars left
Chart shows earlier time region after scrolling

assertions.issues: Mouse drag panning via Playwright mouse events did not reliably trigger LWC scroll. Verified via programmatic scrollToPosition API. handleScroll options confirm drag-scroll is enabled.

assertions.title: Chart is zoomable (mouse wheel)

steps.observed: Chart options confirm handleScale.mouseWheel: true, pinch: true

steps.expected: Visible time range narrows (fewer candles with more detail)
steps.observed: Visible range changed from span 86100s to 78600s after mouse wheel zoom — fewer candles shown with more detail
Chart shows zoomed-in view with fewer, wider candles

assertions.title: Marker positioning bullish below bar bearish above

steps.observed: 259 total markers: 126 bullish (belowBar, arrowUp, color #26a69a), 133 bearish (aboveBar, arrowDown, color #4db6ac). 0 wrong-positioned markers.

assertions.title: Zero detections for a primitive renders gracefully

steps.action: Check if any primitive has zero detections
steps.expected: At least one scenario with zero detections
steps.observed: No primitive has exactly 0 detections in any day/TF combination in current fixture

steps.action: Toggle all primitives off to simulate zero visible detections
steps.observed: Chart renders with only candles and session bands. All toggle buttons remain visible in inactive state. No console errors.
Code checks for null/empty detections arrays and returns empty marker list. getDetectionCountsForDay returns 0 for missing data. renderDetectionSummary handles 0 counts without NaN/undefined.

assertions.issues: No primitive has exactly 0 detections in the fixture data, so visual confirmation of '0' in summary column not directly observed. Code path verified via inspection: missing primitives/TFs show 0 counts.

assertions.title: Single config mode renders correctly

steps.observed: app.evalData.configs = ['current_locked'] — single config

steps.action: Verify chart renders all markers in single color set
steps.observed: All markers use teal (#26a69a) bullish and light teal (#4db6ac) bearish — single color set

steps.action: Verify config toggle adapts to one config
steps.expected: Single toggle button visible, no broken UI
steps.observed: Single 'current_locked' toggle button with teal swatch. No empty slots or broken layout.

steps.action: Verify detection summary shows single column
steps.observed: Summary table has 'Primitive' and 'current_locked' columns only — no empty second config column.
Zero console errors throughout session

assertions.title: Crosshair displays time and price

steps.expected: Crosshair visible with time and price labels
steps.observed: Horizontal dashed line visible with price label (e.g. 1.10) on y-axis. Time label visible on x-axis. Crosshair configured with color #4a4e5a and dashed style (style: 2).
Chart options: crosshair.vertLine.color=#4a4e5a, width=1, style=2; crosshair.horzLine.color=#4a4e5a, width=1, style=2. CrosshairMode.Normal.

frictions.description: Fixture data contains only 1 config ('current_locked'), but task description and validation contract assume 2 configs. This prevents full verification of VAL-CHART-002 (multi-config overlay).
frictions.resolution: Marked VAL-CHART-002 as blocked. Code-level inspection confirms multi-config support via CONFIG_COLORS array.

frictions.description: Mouse drag panning via Playwright mouse events did not reliably trigger Lightweight Charts scroll. Verified via programmatic API instead.
frictions.resolution: Used chart.timeScale().scrollToPosition() API to confirm scrollability. Chart options confirm handleScroll.pressedMouseMove is enabled.

frictions.description: No primitive has exactly 0 detections in any day/TF combination, preventing direct visual verification of '0' display in summary. Verified via code inspection and all-toggles-off test.
frictions.resolution: Toggled all primitives off to verify graceful zero-marker rendering. Code handles empty arrays and missing data correctly.

blockers.description: evaluation_run.json fixture contains only 1 config ('current_locked'). Task description claims 2 configs but actual data has 1. This blocks full verification of multi-config assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Inspected code to confirm multi-config support: CONFIG_COLORS array defines teal (A), amber (B), purple (C) palettes. buildMarkers iterates configs[]. renderConfigToggles creates per-config buttons.

summary: Tested 22 Chart Tab assertions: 21 passed, 1 blocked (VAL-CHART-002: fixture has only 1 config, cannot visually verify multi-config overlay). All interactive features work correctly: config/primitive toggles, TF switching (1m/5m/15m), day navigation (5 days), session bands, detection count summary, scroll/zoom, crosshair, marker positioning. Zero console errors throughout entire testing session.
